# STATUS

## Current Phase

Complete.

## Next Role

None

## Approval State

Approved

## Blockers

## Notes

The pricing page now routes contact CTAs to a dedicated `/contact` page.

Pricing page has been simplified for a cleaner visual hierarchy.

Verified with `npm run check` and `npm run build`.

Pricing page restyled to better match the referenced card layout.

Pricing cards updated with Standard pricing and monthly/annual choices.

Verified again after the latest pricing update.

Latest pass switched pricing to USD with a monthly/annual toggle and softer card colors.

Latest pass also moved back to a minimal stone/beige palette with hover polish.

Latest pass replaced the beige tint with a softer gray shade.

Latest pass added compact file, traffic, and storage caps to each plan card.

Latest pass changed the free trial to a 14-day test and tightened paid-plan caps for direct-from-R2 delivery.

Latest pass also removed published free-plan caps and softened the contact callout highlight.

Latest pass moved the pricing cards to a taller app-card style with yes/no feature rows.

Latest pass replaced the feature rows with a cleaner comparison table for projects, menus, languages, file totals, and traffic.

Latest pass reshaped the section closer to the reference layout and added support priority for Plus.

Latest pass added a highlighted World Cup deal with football-themed cues and Design/Translations priority.

Latest pass shifted World Cup to a black-and-white soccer-ball style and gave Plus and World Cup priority on Design.

Latest pass aligned top-card buttons to the bottom and removed the extra World Cup tags in favor of a small soccer icon and subtle patterned background.

Latest pass changed the World Cup background to a subtler hexagon-like football pattern and clarified Design as priority queue work.

Latest pass switched the World Cup background to a true hex tile pattern closer to the reference.

Latest pass redrew the World Cup background into a more literal football panel pattern.

Latest pass moved World Cup to the lead position and softened Standard so the World Cup deal stands out more.

Latest pass removed the bottom table, moved the pricing details into the cards, and used the provided football background asset.

Latest pass removed the Design row, increased button spacing, and updated the contact callout copy.

Latest pass updated World Cup pricing to dollars and added a dedicated contact request form.

Verified with `npm run check` and `npm run build`.
